title: Steam Rex is unaffected by creature effects and magic

card.rawText: This creature is unaffected by creature effects and magic cards. If your opponent plays a Lightning card, this creature inflicts 2x Atk damage the turn it was used.

effect.value: Unaffected by creature effects and magic cards

plan.title: Steam Rex is unaffected by creature effects and magic
plan.summary: Put Steam Rex on the field and verify the headless route recognizes its static creature-effect and Magic immunity rule.

notes: Set Steam Rex as player_1 primary creature.
This fixture isolates the printed static immunity rule.

steps: Set Steam Rex as player_1 primary creature.
Accept the while-on-field static immunity rule.
manualVerification: Confirm creature effects and Magic cards do not affect Steam Rex while this static rule is active.
riskNotes: This fixture validates static-rule recognition. Steam Rex's separate Lightning-triggered 2x Atk damage effect is covered separately.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Validate Steam Rex's static immunity to creature effects and Magic cards.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
